description: Final quality pass: fix any remaining build/lint errors, ensure all pages render correctly, verify responsive layouts, check accessibility, and commit all changes to main branch.
steps: Run npm run build and fix any TypeScript or compilation errors
Run npm run lint and fix any linting issues
- Proper 'use client' directives on all client components
- GSAP cleanup with gsap.context() and return () => ctx.revert() in useEffect
- Reduced motion support (prefers-reduced-motion media query check)
- Proper ARIA attributes on interactive elements
- No console.log or debugging code left behind
- No references to non-existent files (images, videos, fonts)
Verify the service pages still work: the ServiceHero, ServiceContent, ServiceCTA components may reference styling from globals.css that was changed
Verify the contact page components (ContactHero, ContactCards, ContactMap, ContactCTA) still work with updated styles
Check that the ConsultationModal still works (it uses the ConsultationContext)
Ensure responsive behavior: hero layout works on mobile (stack columns), service cards go single-column on mobile, process section falls back gracefully
Run final npm run build to confirm zero errors
Run final npm run lint to confirm zero warnings/errors
Stage and commit all changes with a descriptive commit message
acceptance_criteria: npm run build passes with zero errors, all 11 pages generate
npm run lint passes with zero errors
No references to non-existent assets anywhere in the codebase
All components have proper reduced-motion support
All interactive elements have ARIA attributes
All changes are committed to main branch
findings: All verification passed without any fixes needed. Build generates all 11 pages, lint produces zero errors. No broken asset references found. All Home components (Hero, DesignShowcase, Services, Process) have proper use client, gsap.context() with ctx.revert() cleanup, and prefers-reduced-motion support. No console.log or debugging code. ARIA attributes present on decorative elements. CustomCursor hides on touch devices. MagneticButton uses inline-block display to avoid layout issues. Navigation has all required elements (logo link, nav links, mega menu trigger, mobile menu toggle, CTA button). Footer service links use correct service data from constants. Service and contact pages work correctly with all valid data references.
